india_trends.title: US Stocks: Eli Lilly raises annual forecasts as GLP-1 drugs fuel growth
india_trends.summary: Eli ​Lilly raised its annual profit and ​revenue forecasts and posted better-than-expected first quarter on Thursday, on steady demand ​for its weight-loss and diabetes drugs Zepbound and Mounjaro, in its first results since launching oral GLP-1 pill Foundayo.

india_trends.title: Bank of England holds rates and spells out inflation risks from Iran war
india_trends.summary: The Bank of England kept interest rates on hold on Thursday and set out scenarios for ​the economic impact of the Iran war, one of which ​could require a "forceful" increase in borrowing costs.

india_trends.title: BSNL sets ambitious Arpu target of ₹150 in FY27, betting on 4G rollout, higher-value plan
india_trends.summary: With a recent 42% rise in Arpu to ₹101, Bharat Sanchar Nigam Ltd aims to capitalize on network modernization and 4G expansion to increase average revenue per user.

india_trends.title: Gainers & Losers: HUL, Waaree Energies among 6 big movers on Thursday
india_trends.summary: Indian markets ended sharply lower, dragged by FMCG, banking and auto stocks. Select stocks saw steep moves as earnings triggered declines in some even as Syngene and Newgen gained.

india_trends.title: Gujarat Cotex to raise nearly Rs 43 cr through rights issue
india_trends.summary: Gujarat Cotex is set to raise approximately Rs 43 crore through a rights issue to fund its expansion projects, including a new premium hotel. The issue, offering six shares for every one held, opened on April 10 and closes May 8. Proceeds will also bolster the company's financial standing as it dive

india_trends.title: Cars24 co-founder Mehul Agrawal steps back amid senior-level exits
india_trends.summary: The announcement comes just two days after, co-founder Gajendra Jangid, who had served as Cars24's chief marketing officer since its inception, announced that he would also be stepping away from his executive role.

india_trends.title: Sensex today | Stock Market Highlights: Sensex, Nifty close in red as market breadth turns sharply negative
india_trends.summary: Sensex, Nifty Trading Highlights: April 30: Indian benchmark indices ended lower on Thursday, with Sensex and Nifty slipping amid broad-based selling. Only IT stocks managed gains, while most sectors declined and market breadth turned negative with more losers than gainers.

india_trends.title: Reliance Retail expands beauty portfolio with acquisition of Priyanka Chopra’s haircare brand ‘Anomaly’ — What we know
india_trends.summary: Reliance Retail has acquired Priyanka Chopra's haircare brand ‘Anomaly’ in a bid to expand its beauty portfolio. The move is expected to accelerate the giant's omnichannel scale-up across retail network and Tira, a release stated.

india_trends.title: Reliance Retail buys Priyanka Chopra Jonas’ Anomaly in beauty expansion push
india_trends.summary: Reliance Retail has acquired Priyanka Chopra Jonas's global haircare brand Anomaly. This move expands Reliance Retail's beauty and personal care offerings. Anomaly is known for its clean, vegan, and affordable products. Reliance Retail plans to scale the brand in India and internationally. Priyanka

india_trends.title: Smartworks revenue rises 31% to Rs 1,796 crore in FY26; turns profitable
india_trends.summary: Smartworks achieved significant growth in FY26. Revenue rose to Rs 1,796 crore. The company became India's first listed flexible workspace platform to exceed 10 million square feet. It also reported its first full year of profitability. Contracted rental revenue surpassed Rs 5,200 crore. Smartworks'

india_trends.title: Domestic footfalls lighting up India's hotels
india_trends.summary: India's hotel industry is evolving, emphasizing on domestic travel and local demand. Investment is growing, particularly in Bengaluru and Mumbai, with an increased shift towards smaller cities, shows a new report by HVS Anarock.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Strong volumes, higher prices: HUL walks a tightrope as West Asia conflict lifts costs
india_trends.summary: HUL raises prices to offset cost pressure even as volumes hit a 15-quarter high in Q4FY26.
